stemHtml: Can a pilot drink alcohol away from home base, the night before a duty?

options.a: The pilot must stop drinking alcohol by 1 a.m. and the blood alcohol level must be below 0.02% by/before 9 a.m. (duty report time) for an 11 a.m. flight.
options.b: The pilot is able to drink until 3 a.m. before a 9 a.m. duty report time for an 11 a.m. flight.
options.c: Alcohol level to be below 0.02% by 11 a.m..
options.d: The pilot can not drink at all the night before.
